caption: A young man with blonde hair, wearing glasses, white over-ear headphones, and a dark blue patterned shirt, is seated in a room with a grey brick-patterned wall. To his left is a decorated green Christmas tree with multi-colored lights. Behind him is a framed monitor displaying a blue and white screen with the number "20" visible. A black microphone is positioned in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man expresses amusement and excitement. He begins by gesturing with both hands raised near his face with a surprised expression. As the sequence progresses, he smiles and laughs, gesturing with his hands and leaning forward, eventually closing his eyes in laughter. His expressions shift from wide-eyed surprise to a joyful laugh while he continues to interact with someone off-camera.
